heading: Annual report
label: 21908 Annual report
text: Not later than January 1 of each year, the corporation shall submit a report to Congress on the activities of the corporation during the prior calendar year, including a complete report of its receipts and expenditures. The report may not be printed as a public document.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2190836:3308., ; , , .July 5, 1935, ch. 373, § 849 Stat. 459Pub. L. 88–504, § 4(4)78 Stat. 636Aug. 30, 1964The word “submit” is substituted for “make and transmit”, and the word “activities” is substituted for “proceedings”, for consistency in the revised title. The word “full” is omitted as included in “complete”.
